lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਕੀਰਤਿਵੰਤ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਅਰੁ ਸਿਧਿ ਨ ਛੋਡਇ ਸਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: fun keerativant sadaa sukh sanpat ridh ar sidh na chhodde sath |
lines.english: And, the Praiseworthy Guru is blessed with eternal peace, wealth and prosperity; the supernatural spiritual powers of the Siddhis never leave him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰੵਉ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਮਾਯਾ ਮਦ ਮੋਹਿਤ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਅਉ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: taaryau sansaar maayaa mad mohit amrit naam deeo samarath |
lines.english: The Universe is intoxicated with the wine of Maya, but it has been saved; the All-powerful Guru has blessed it with the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਿ ਬਡੌ ਅਤਿਵੰਤੁ ਮਹਾਬਲਿ ਸੇਵਕਿ ਦਾਸਿ ਕਹਿਓ ਇਹੁ ਤਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: daan baddau ativant mahaabal sevak daas kahio ihu tath |
lines.english: His Gifts are vast and great; His awesome Power is supreme. Your humble servant and slave speaks this truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਭਵਨ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: teen bhavan bharapoor rahio soee |
lines.english: He is totally pervading and permeating the three realms;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਹਿ ਕਹਾ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਕਾਹੂ ਕੀ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਬਸੀਸਿ ਧਰਿਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਥੁ ॥੭॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: taeh kahaa paravaah kaahoo kee jaa kai basees dhario gur hath |7|49|
lines.english: One, upon whose head the Guru has placed His Hand - with whom should he be concerned? ||7||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਅਸੁਰ ਅੰਤੁ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar asur ant nahee paayau |
lines.english: The angels, human beings and demons have not found His limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨ ਸਰਸੁ ਕੀਅਉ ਨ ਜਗਤ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: apan saras keeo na jagat koee |
lines.english: in all the world, He has not created another like Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁਨ ਆਪੁ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਉਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapun aap aap hee upaayau |
lines.english: He Himself created Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਚਲੁ ਅਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਉ ਪੁਰਖੋਤਮੁ ਅਪਾਰ ਪਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: abinaasee achal ajonee sanbhau purakhotam apaar pare |
lines.english: The Eternal, Imperishable, Unmoving and Unchanging, Unborn, Self-Existent, Primal Being of the Soul, the Infinity of the Infinite,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਯਉ ਨਹੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਸੁਰੇ ਅਸੁਰਹ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧ੍ਰਬ ਖੋਜੰਤ ਫਿਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paayau nahee ant sure asurah nar gan gandhrab khojant fire |
lines.english: The angels, demons and human beings have not found His limits; the heavenly heralds and celestial singers wander around, searching for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਈ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਮਨਿ ਧੵਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath sadaa soee sarab jeea man dhayaaeiyau |
lines.english: the Eternal All-powerful Cause of causes - all beings meditate on Him in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਜਯੋ ਜਯ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sree gur raamadaas jayo jay jag meh tai har param pad paaeiyau |1|
lines.english: O Great and Supreme Guru Raam Daas, Your Victory resounds across the universe. You have attained the supreme status of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਦੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur naanak bhagat karee ik man tan man dhan gobind deeo |
lines.english: Nanak, the True Guru, worships God single-mindedly; He surrenders His body, mind and wealth to the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗਦਿ ਅਨੰਤ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਨਿਜ ਧਾਰੀ ਅਗਮ ਗੵਾਨਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਸੵਉ ਹੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: angad anant moorat nij dhaaree agam gayaan ras rasyau heeo |
lines.english: The Infinite Lord enshrined His Own Image in Guru Angad. In His heart, He delights in the spiritual wisdom of the Unfathomable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅਮਰਦਾਸਿ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ਕੀਅਉ ਵਸਿ ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਧੵਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas karataar keeo vas vaahu vaahu kar dhayaaeiyau |
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas brought the Creator Lord under His control. Waaho! Waaho! Meditate on Him!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਜਯੋ ਜਯ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sree gur raamadaas jayo jay jag meh tai har param pad paaeiyau |2|
lines.english: O Great and Supreme Guru Raam Daas, Your Victory resounds across the universe. You have attained the supreme status of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਦੁ ਧ੍ਰੂ ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦੁ ਸੁਦਾਮਾ ਪੁਬ ਭਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਜੁ ਗਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: naarad dhraoo prahalaad sudaamaa pub bhagat har ke ju ganan |
lines.english: Naarad, Dhroo, Prahlaad and Sudaamaa are accounted among the Lord's devotees of the past.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਬਰੀਕੁ ਜਯਦੇਵ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਨਾਮਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਭਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: anbareek jayadev trilochan naamaa avar kabeer bhanan |
lines.english: Ambreek, Jai Dayv, Trilochan, Naam Dayv and Kabeer are also remembered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੌ ਅਵਤਾਰੁ ਭਯਉ ਕਲਿ ਭਿੰਤਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਜਗਤ੍ਰ ਪਰਿ ਛਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin kau avataar bhyau kal bhintar jas jagatr par chhaaeiyau |
lines.english: They were incarnated in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga; their praises have spread over all the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਤੁਝੈ ਨਰ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਮਿਟਿਅਉ ਜੁ ਤਿਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa kar simarant tujhai nar kaam krodh mittiaau ju tinan |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on You within their minds - their sexual desire and anger are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਜਯੋ ਜਯ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sree gur raamadaas jayo jay jag meh tai har param pad paaeiyau |3|
lines.english: O Great and Supreme Guru Raam Daas, Your Victory resounds across the universe. You have attained the supreme status of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਚਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਤੁਝੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਰਿਦ੍ਰੁ ਮਿਟਯਉ ਜੁ ਖਿਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: baachaa kar simarant tujhai tina dukh daridru mittyau ju khinan |
lines.english: Those who remember You in meditation with their words, are rid of their poverty and pain in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਜਯੋ ਜਯ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sree gur raamadaas jayo jay jag meh tai har param pad paaeiyau |4|
lines.english: O Great and Supreme Guru Raam Daas, Your Victory resounds across the universe. You have attained the supreme status of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਰਿ ਤੁਅ ਦਰਸ ਪਰਸ ਪਾਰਸ ਸਰ ਬਲੵ ਭਟ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam kar tua daras paras paaras sar balay bhatt jas gaaeiyau |
lines.english: Those who obtain the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, by the karma of their good deeds, touch the Philosopher's Stone, and like BALL the poet, sing Your Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਮਰੰਤ ਨਯਨ ਕੇ ਤਿਮਰ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਖਿਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jih satigur simarant nayan ke timar mitteh khin |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the True Guru - the darkness of their eyes is removed in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਮਰੰਥਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿਨੋ ਦਿਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jih satigur simaranth ridai har naam dino din |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the True Guru within their hearts, are blessed with the Lord's Name, day by day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਮਰੰਥਿ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਤਪਤਿ ਮਿਟਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jih satigur simaranth jeea kee tapat mittaavai |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the True Guru within their souls - the fire of desire is extinguished for them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਬਲੵ ਭਣਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਕਰਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: soee raamadaas gur balay bhan mil sangat dhan dhan karahu |
lines.english: So speaks BALL the poet: Blessed is Guru Raam Daas; joining the Sangat, the Congregation, call Him blessed and great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਮਰੰਥਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jih satigur simaranth ridh sidh nav nidh paavai |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the True Guru, are blessed with wealth and prosperity, supernatural spiritual powers and the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਨਰਹੁ ॥੫॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: jih satigur lag prabh paaeeai so satigur simarahu narahu |5|54|
lines.english: Meditate on the True Guru, O men, through Whom the Lord is obtained. ||5||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਤ ਨ ਛੋਡਿਓ ਪਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin sabad kamaae param pad paaeo sevaa karat na chhoddio paas |
lines.english: Living the Word of the Shabad, He attained the supreme status; while performing selfless service, He did not leave the side of Guru Amar Daas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਗਉਹਰੁ ਗੵਾਨ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਉਜੀਆਰਉ ਦੁਖ ਦਰਿਦ੍ਰ ਅੰਧੵਾਰ ਕੋ ਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: taa te gauhar gayaan pragatt ujeearau dukh daridr andhayaar ko naas |
lines.english: From that service, the light from the jewel of spiritual wisdom shines forth, radiant and bright; it has destroyed pain, poverty and darkness.
